account.description: Account name provided by your account manager - set to test-account for test mode

placement.description: Placement name provided by your account manager - set to test-placement300x250 for test mode

testMode.description: Activate test mode - 100% test bids - placement needs be set to test-placement300x250 for this option to work

useSourceBidderCode.description: Use seat bidder code as hb_bidder, instead of teal (or configured alias)

subAccount.description: subAccount name, if provided by your account manager
